description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular wicker picnic basket with a gently arched top edge and a robust, tightly woven structure. The basket is crafted from natural, brown wicker strands, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The front features two rectangular cut-out handles integrated into the weave, allowing for easy carrying. The weave is consistent and moderately tight, providing both durability and a classic aesthetic. The interior is spacious and open, with no visible lining or compartments, making it suitable for carrying various items. There are no visible decorative elements or closure mechanisms, and the basket does not have a lid.
description: A medium, rectangular wicker picnic basket with arched top, cut-out handles, and a tight, rustic weave. The basket is open and unlined, with no lid or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched top edge and two rectangular cut-out handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the basket's depth and the continuous woven pattern along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full arch of the back and the uninterrupted wicker weave.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the basket's depth and weave consistency.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, rectangular cut-out handles integrated into the front and back weave.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, moderately tight weave with visible horizontal and vertical wicker strands.
